title: malleastrum ramiflorum
intro: Malleastrum ramiflorum, also known as the Mala Ram or Ramiflorum, is a plant species native to India, belonging to the Rutaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cold, and cough. The health benefits of Malleastrum ramiflorum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The plant is typically prepared as an herbal tea, powder, or oil, and its medicinal properties are extracted through methods such as decoction, infusion, or cold pressing.
